cards.title: Whispered wisdom of a parent's last words
cards.body: Dr Ijaz Durrani celebrates the precious nature of parting words and advice from dying parents to children. This touching reflection explores how deathbed wisdom shapes us long after those we love are gone.

cards.title: The pet that taught us how to raise a family
cards.body: A family discovers that caring for their rabbit Tilly requires different nurturing skills than raising their babies. The experience of raising a creature you can't reason with offers unexpected parenting lessons.

cards.title: I live by advice dad gave me on his deathbed
cards.body: Polly Hudson reflects on how her father's deathbed advice continues to guide her 14 years later. She recognizes the small ways she mirrors her father, keeping his wisdom alive through her choices.

cards.title: Keeping my dead wife's books safe for our son
cards.body: Ben O'Mara discovers that reading his late wife's favorite novels with their son helps him process grief and guilt. Sharing her world of words with his son creates connection and healing.

cards.title: Parenting a teenager doing A-levels is impotent
cards.body: Zoe Williams explores the unique helplessness of parenting teens tackling advanced exams like chemistry and further maths. Holding flashcards fills her with horror as she realizes she cannot truly help them through this.

cards.title: Why promoting independence helps anxious children
cards.body: Anxious children benefit when given opportunities to do slightly risky things without adult intervention. Independence and managed risk-taking help reduce anxiety and build confidence.

cards.title: Stop protecting your child's brain, build it
cards.body: Parents obsess over limiting screen time but should focus on what actually builds thinking capacity in children. The answer lies in older, proven methods of cognitive development.

cards.title: The relationship cost of avoiding family boundaries
cards.body: Unclear boundaries within close family relationships quietly create resentment and strain intimate partnerships. Setting healthy limits strengthens rather than weakens family bonds.

cards.title: Family estrangement effects on wellbeing are mixed
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a continuum rather than as a binary choice, and support plays an important role in outcomes. Research shows varied wellbeing effects depending on individual circumstances and support systems.
